title: Little Kitchen Party Time Tea Set, Kids Pretend Play Set with Teapot, Cups and Accessories, Ages 4-7, Pink and Pastel Colours
features: COMPLETE SET: Charming tea party set includes a decorative teapot with floral design, 2 teacups with bow details, dessert plate, and colourful spoons for imaginative play
PERFECT SIZE: Perfectly sized for little hands, this set features a 15 cm tall teapot and appropriately scaled cups and accessories for comfortable handling
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Encourages role-play, social skills development, and imagination through pretend tea parties while helping develop fine motor skills
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 4-7 years, featuring durable construction and child-safe materials in delightful pastel colours
DESIGN FEATURES: Beautiful pastel colour scheme in pink, mint green, and yellow with decorative floral patterns and bow accents for an enchanting tea party experience
description: Product Description Delight your little one with this charming Party Time Tea Set from Little Kitchen, perfect for imaginative play and social development. The set features a beautifully designed pink teapot adorned with delicate mint green floral patterns, complemented by matching teacups with adorable bow details in pastel yellow and mint green. This comprehensive set includes everything needed for a proper tea party: a decorative teapot, charming teacups, and coordinating accessories. The pieces are crafted in soft, child-friendly pastel colours that create an enchanting teatime atmosphere. Designed for children aged 4-7 years, this tea set encourages role-play, social interaction, and creativity while helping develop fine motor skills through pouring and serving motions. The set's durable construction ensures it can withstand countless tea parties, while its appropriate size makes it perfect for small hands. Create magical moments of pretend play as your child hosts delightful tea parties for their toys, friends, or family members. You will receive 1 Kitchen Set only Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable For Children Under 3 Years. Contains Small Parts That May Pose A Choking Hazard.
